# CWE-344 vulnerable: Use of Invariant Value in Dynamically Changing Context (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-344-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"net/http"
)

const shipmentHMACSecret = "warehouse-shared-secret-42"

func SignShipmentManifest(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	payload := []byte(r.FormValue("manifest"))
	if len(payload) == 0 {
		http.Error(w, "manifest required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(shipmentHMACSecret))
	mac.Write(payload)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream")
	w.Write(mac.Sum(nil))
}
